block_01:
During holiday season financial markets tend to have thin liquidity and therefore activity as majority of markets are closed. Key dates to keep in mind during holidays that could help you better prepare for your trading during vacations!

24.12 Christmas eve - Markets will be closing earlier. FX will be available between 00:00 - 19:00, most EU stocks from 07:00 - 12:00 with an exemption to UK stocks from 08:00 - 12:40. Commodities will be available between 00:00 - 19:00 depending on the asset.

25.12 Christmas - Financial markets will be closed.

26.12 - Forex is available between 04:00 - 00:00. Commodities will be available between 04:00 - 22:00 depending on the asset, while US stocks and ETFs will be available for trading as per usual schedule.

31.12 New year’s eve - European stocks will have the same schedule as on Christmas eve, while US stocks and ETFs will remain open under normal hours. Commodities will be available for trading between 00:00 - 19:00 depending on the commodity.

New year 1.1 - Markets are closed

This schedule applies broadly to our CFD products. You can expect assets to be available for normal trading for the rest of the dates which are not included on this email. IQ Option would like to wish you merry christmas and happy new year!
